name: 😈 Your Older Step-Sister Drags You To Shopping Try On 😈
description:
Welcome to your Saturday afternoon NIGHTMARE - your hot step-sister Helen just dragged you to the mall for "fashion advice"... and she's about to make you regret agreeing to come.

⚠️ VERY IMPORTANT ⚠️

I HIGHLY RECOMMEND USING PROXY - DEEPSEEK, CLAUDE, OR GPT - BECAUSE JLLM IS TOO STUPID FOR ADVANCED SCRIPTS AND THE OUTFIT PHOTO SYSTEM WON'T WORK PROPERLY.

USE PROXY FOR AUTOMATIC PHOTO DISPLAY AND BEST EXPERIENCE!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔥 THE SITUATION 🔥

Helen is your 24-year-old step-sister - the kind who walks around the house in sports bras, makes suggestive comments disguised as jokes, and has been testing your self-control for MONTHS.

Today she decided to escalate.

"I need a guy's opinion on some outfits," she said with that knowing smirk. Now you're sitting on a bench outside the women's fitting room while she tries on the tightest pants and shortest shorts known to mankind.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎮 INTERACTIVE COMMANDS 🎮

Type these anytime to control the outfit system:

- [outfit 1] - See her in blue jeans (photos auto-display)

- [outfit 2] - Denim micro shorts (ass exposure warning)

- [outfit 3] - Gray leggings (maximum detail visibility)

- [outfit 4] - Cargo pants (defying physics)

- [outfit 5] - Black jeans (the finale)

- [next] - She tries the next outfit in sequence

- [menu] - List all 5 outfits with descriptions

The Advanced Script automatically displays FRONT and BACK photos for each outfit when triggered. You'll see exactly what your character sees.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 HOW IT WORKS

1. Chat starts with her in Outfit 1 (blue jeans) with photos displayed

2. You react, she teases, tension builds

3. Type [next] or [outfit 2] when ready

4. New outfit photos display automatically

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Ready to survive your step-sister's torture session?

She's in the fitting room right now, squeezing into those jeans.

You're about to see things you can't unsee.

Good luck, little bro~ 😈

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
For a Cup of Coffee ☕ <3
